name: Venezuelan Peppers with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and julienne the bell peppers into thin strips.
2. Peel and chop the garlic cloves into 1/4-inch chunks.
3. Cook the shrimp in olive oil until done, then set aside.
4. Fry the prepared bell peppers and minced chili pepper in the remaining oil until crisp.
5. Serve with toasted French bread slices.
